# Aetas in the Workplace

> Aetas in the Workplace is a workplace performance consultancy for SME employers in the United Kingdom. It helps organisations improve business performance, retention and employee engagement through financial wellbeing, employee benefits review and strategic workplace planning. The programme is delivered by Matthew Steiner and Daniel Cottam, and supported by Aetas Wealth, an FCA-regulated financial advisory firm (FCA registration 458421).

Aetas in the Workplace is not a generic employee benefits platform. It is a consultancy-led engagement for organisations with between 10 and 250 employees, built around the Return on Employee Investment (ROEI) framework. Every engagement begins with a no-cost Workplace Performance Audit before any recommendation is made.

## Who this is for

- SME and mid-sized limited companies (10 to 250 employees) seeking a commercially justified approach to workforce performance
- LLPs and professional practices including law firms, accountancy practices, architecture and surveying firms, where support staff financial pressure affects fee-earning output
- Business owners, managing directors, HR directors and finance directors where financial pressure in the workforce is affecting output, retention or leadership capacity

## The ROEI Framework

ROEI (Return on Employee Investment) is the proprietary Aetas framework for measuring and improving the commercial return on an employer's total investment in their people. It covers salary, pension, benefits, training, wellbeing and management time. The five stages are: Measure, Diagnose, Recommend, Implement, and Measure Again.

## The programme pillars

**Clarity** - a structured review of pension, benefits and financial support arrangements. Identifies gaps, inefficiencies and spend that is not performing.

**Confidence** - practical financial education for employees. Group workshops and optional one-to-one sessions with a regulated financial planner.

**Stability** - ongoing access to tools, guidance and partner support. Sustains improvements and builds financial resilience across the workforce over time.

## The team

- Matthew Steiner, Managing Director. Leads every Workplace Performance Audit personally. Over 20 years in financial services. matthew.steiner@aetas-wealth.com
- Daniel Cottam, Financial Planner. Delivers employee-facing workshops and one-to-one guidance sessions.

## Case studies

- [Bristol-based organisation](https://workplace.aetas-wealth.com/case-studies/bristol-organisation) - pension review, workshops and partner services delivered. Ongoing engagement.
- [UK retail group](https://workplace.aetas-wealth.com/case-studies/uk-retail-group) - diagnostic and benefits review completed. Shop St introduced as immediate employee benefit.

- Email: matthew.steiner@aetas-wealth.com

## Regulatory

Aetas in the Workplace provides workplace financial wellbeing, education and consultancy services to employers. These services do not constitute regulated financial advice. Where regulated advice is required, this is provided separately by Aetas Wealth, a trading style of Insight Financial Associates Limited, authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority (FCA registration: 458421). Registered office: 13 Hanover Square, Mayfair, London W1S 1HN.
